offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 insurance claims/month, inaccurate billing codes cause claim denials. We provide a coding assistant instead of manual coding by administrative staff.
problem: inaccurate billing codes leading to claim denials
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 medical clinics with demo video
Community forums where clinics share coding tools
try_it: Let users try manual code entry and error checking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
